title: Cobblemon: Cobble it
description: Shows the Pokemon types while hovering over it!
body:
I made this for a friend but thought somebody else might like it. Probably going to be updated across versions.

 

It shows the Pokemon types near the cursor while hovering over a Pokemon.

- pic made [Pancakes](https://bsky.app/profile/pancakes.zeus.kitchen)

Fabric only! (Might release it to forge later)
